title: A Phase 2 Single-Patient Study of Investigational Agent XYZ-101 in Refractory Focal Epilepsy

investigator.name: Jordan A. Rivera, MD
investigator.degrees: MD; Board-certified Neurology; 12 years clinical research experience (CV attached)
investigator.address: Montclair Neurology Associates, 200 Bloomfield Ave, Montclair, NJ 07042

consent.purpose: to evaluate the safety and preliminary efficacy of XYZ-101 in reducing seizure frequency in refractory focal epilepsy
consent.duration: approximately 24 weeks (screening, a 16-week treatment period, and follow-up)
consent.procedures: clinic visits, electroencephalography (EEG), blood draws, a seizure diary, and administration of the investigational agent XYZ-101
consent.risks: possible dizziness, somnolence, and elevated liver enzymes; because XYZ-101 is investigational, there may be risks that are not yet known
consent.benefits: your seizures may or may not improve; information from this study may help future patients with epilepsy
consent.alternatives: continued standard antiseizure medications, participation in a different clinical trial, or making no change to your current treatment
consent.confidentiality_statement: your research records will be kept confidential to the extent permitted by law

fields.title: A Phase 2 Single-Patient Study of Investigational Agent XYZ-101 in Refractory Focal Epilepsy
fields.objectives: Primary: characterize safety and tolerability. Secondary: change in monthly seizure frequency.
fields.eligibility_criteria: Adults with refractory focal epilepsy; >= 4 seizures/month; failed >= 2 antiseizure medications.
fields.dosing_plan: XYZ-101 titrated per the protocol dose-escalation schedule.
fields.safety_monitoring: Per the Data and Safety Monitoring Plan and the medical monitor.
